title: God’s Knights Close In
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Unknown person #10, Loki, King Harald, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Usopp as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I saw it all with my very own eyes!! Harald and all those soldiers...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...were killed by the act of a demon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Harald struggled to his last breath to keep Elbaf...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...from falling into that demon's hands!!!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: Wait?! So Loki didn't kill our King???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I held my tongue, fearing that our people...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...would rise up in revenge, leading us into an untimely war...

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: ...Our King Never Wanted!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Loki took the people's anger upon himself when he sailed out to sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He may have always been boorish, but... He is innocent!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the gist, but it's not quite how I'd put it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don't get carried away, Elder Jarul!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now today!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Three new demons have appeared to subjugate our nation,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had hoped this matter was behind us, but we are once more in need of great power!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: seems this job's over. Guess I'll go back to sleep...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm speaking to you now, demons!! You can take our culture and history...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...but let our little ones go!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will not show you the same patience Harold did!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Forgive me, little ones.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Cover your ears if you can!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You speak of subjecting us and picture our people to be your slaves!!! Who the hell do you bastards think you're dealing with!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Well said, JARUL!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Elbaf I admire would never bend the knee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If the Harley ProPhecies are true...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the world is bound to face a great divide one day!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So be it!! from this day forward...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All Elbaf will stand against the world government!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you really think some thorns, illusions, and this little reverse game...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...would be enough to make us Bow?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I like this geezer.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet you do. 300 years ago, he was known as the strongest being to ever hail from these waters!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We will never submit to your Dominion!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What say you... Proud Warriors of Elbaf?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Well said, Elder Jarul!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gyaah!!! The Elbaf I know and love is back!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We get it already, USOPP!! Focus on getting rid of these damn arrows!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We will protect the peace...

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: ...Harald Dreamed of!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: 'eeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We're finally here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They said if we get caught up between them, it's over!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't worry. I have a plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: A spark of Resistance Flares!!!

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 46 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
